title: Struisies shine at the Allegretto Eisteddfod National Round!
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS -  On 7 September, talented Struisie learners participated in the Allegretto Eisteddfod in Stilbaai and the school are bursting with pride at their exceptional performances!","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - On 7 September, talented Struisie learners participated in the Allegretto Eisteddfod in Stilbaai and the school are bursting with pride at their exceptional performances!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Each participant showcased, not only their skill, but also their dedication, discipline and passion for the arts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nerine van der Merwe and Talia Lafleur who were awarded the title of Allegretto Ambassadors for 2026.","html":"Nerine van der Merwe and Talia Lafleur who were awarded the title of Allegretto Ambassadors for 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Here are the learners and their remarkable achievements:","html":"Here are the learners and their remarkable
